task: Fix blank training session screen after session load failure or slow Day 1 rebuild

governance_bootstrap.summary: UI and runtime fixes require real verification, completion evidence, scoped commit, push, and deploy.
Completion requires real user-facing/runtime verification and completion evidence guard validation.

changes: Made API Day 1 rebuild and migration paths use include_evidence=false so session load and tool-switch repair do not block on evidence retrieval.
Kept direct _edu_vp_build_day1 default evidence behavior intact for tests and explicit backend calls.
Added GET timeout override support and gave fetchSession a 45 second timeout.
Added a visible session-load failure card with a retry button so the UI no longer renders only header plus empty Day 0 fallback when state is null.
Removed schema migration checks from read-only /session and /cases endpoints; write/login/intake paths still perform schema ensure.
Added a light training-session payload query so /session does not load full edu_case_turns message history just to render the training screen.
Allowed _edu_vp_refresh_state to skip Day 1 migration scans and used that fast path for /session reads.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-BrMfhGUf.js

verification.name: Mac Mini edu app runtime entrypoint
verification.result: passed before deploy: edu app HTTP entrypoint responded

residual_risk: Post-deploy authenticated session timing and production bundle check will run after Mac Mini deploy.
